name: O'henry Bars II
recipeInstructions:
1. If using Rice Krispies instead of Special K, increase the cereal to 6 cups.
2. Heat sugar, corn syrup, and salt until it boils.
3. Add peanut butter and stir until boiling.
4. Pour in Special K and nuts; mix until coated.
5. Spread in a buttered 9 x 13 pan and press.
6. Cool completely.
7. Melt chocolate chips over double boiler and spread on cooled peanut butter mixture.
8. Cut into bars when cool.
